message:
refactor(restore): replace JSONL git history with dolt_history_ tables (gt-vemg9q.2)

Replace readIssueFromJSONL and git checkout approach with store.History()
query against dolt_history_issues. Remove git helper functions
(getCurrentGitHead, gitHasUncommittedChanges, gitCheckout). Find
pre-compaction version by selecting the history entry with the most
content. Update tests to match new implementation.
